case_title: TRIMARK ERF, INC. VS. 140 NM LLC DBA TROU NORMAND

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF TRIMARK ERF, INC. IS PRESENT.
